Notes: RT-4. Core product promise broken. CTO investigation underway (findings due Apr 18). Likely root cause: OS background task throttling (BGTaskScheduler / WorkManager). Notes: PC-3. Conversion and App Store compliance risk. Users who cannot dismiss feel trapped — violates App Store guidelines. CTO estimate: <1 day fix (switch to scrollable sheet, keep dismiss button inside scroll container). Already in Tier 1 sprint plan.
DevOps Risk: Bounded fix. Ship this week. Monitor trial-to-paid conversion rate after it lands. App Store reviewers test on small devices — this is a rejection risk.

Notes: SK-2. Root cause confirmed (CTO): local date vs UTC comparison. Fix: store last_contact_utc, calculate all streak windows in UTC, convert to local time for display only. Ship SK-6 timezone test suite (DST, date-line, mid-day changes) alongside fix — not after.
DevOps Risk: Retention damage compounds silently. Users who hit this churn without filing a bug. Not a current-sprint blocker but must not slip past P3. Watch streak break rate spike in monitoring after any timezone-adjacent deployment.
